---
title: "Caltech Revealjs No-R Smoke Test"
subtitle: "Layout And Theme Coverage"
author: "Extension Smoke Test"
institute: "Caltech"
date: today
format: caltech-revealjs
---

## Layout Coverage

:::{.pull-left}
### Left

- Theme colors
- Two-column layout
- Default typography
:::

:::{.pull-right}
### Right

:::{.box-2}
Short callout.
:::

:::{.box-4}
Longer callout block for testing the extension without any R dependency.
:::
:::

## Slide Classes {.header_background}

Header banner should be orange, with body content pushed down below it.

## Inverse Slide {.inverse}

This verifies the inverse slide colors.

## Hide Logo {.hide_logo}

The logo should be hidden on this slide.

## Notes And Math

Euler's identity: $e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0$.

::: {.notes}
This note block is included to make sure Quarto notes still work.
:::
